title: Limitation of liability for authorizing jurisdiction
doc_html:
§9027.  Limitation of liability for authorizing jurisdiction

Neither the state nor any of its local governmental subdivisions organizing an economic development corporation pursuant to this Chapter shall be held liable for any action of such corporation.

Added by Acts 1978, No. 617, §1.
